description: Distinguishes mutable development branch tips from frozen verification targets. Breaks the evidence-commit loop: advancing HEAD on a named branch no longer implies inventory must chase tip_verified; ledger and ci-remote record remain canonical verified history.

mutable_branch_detection.rule: Any symbolic branch ref (non-detached) that does not match exempt_as_frozen_tip is a mutable tip. Inventory ci_provenance must use pending + tip_pending at those tips even when HEAD equals last_remote_qualifying_commit.

frozen_verification_context.description: Only in these git contexts may MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY ci_provenance claim status=verified and tip_state_truth=tip_verified (still requiring agreement with record.json and last_* fields).

modes.rule: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD == "HEAD" (detached) and HEAD == last_verified_commit == record artifact_commit_hash
Branch name matches exempt_as_frozen_tip and HEAD == last_verified_commit
git describe --tags --exact-match matches tag_glob and HEAD == last_verified_commit

deterministic_promotion_path.primary: After a qualifying green GitHub Actions run on commit S, create an annotated or lightweight tag matching tag_glob at S (example: tlc-gov-verified-<workflow_run_id>). Alternatively fast-forward or reset a provenance/verified-<shortsha> branch to S. Inventory on the default or feature branch stays pending+tip_pending; auditors checkout the tag, detached HEAD, or provenance branch to read verified tip-state.
deterministic_promotion_path.secondary_manual_record: Optional file verification/promotion/tip-verified-snapshot.json may record run id and sha for humans; it does not substitute frozen git context for INVENTORY verified claims.
deterministic_promotion_path.not_allowed: Claiming inventory verified+tip_verified solely because HEAD matches the anchor while still on a mutable symbolic branch (e.g. main, feature/*).
